title: OKI and Hitachi to Integrate ATM Businesses
tags: Itochu and Seven Bank Enter into Capital and Business AllianceSeven Bank is entering into a capital and business alliance with ITOCHU to adapt to a changing financial landscape (digital payments, new competition) and drive new growth. The goal is to combine Seven Bank’s expertise in ATMs and retail financial services with ITOCHU’s vast consumer-related business platforms to create newJapan FinTech ObserverNorbert Gehrke
